name: Sundae Slobber Tooth
description: 'Sundae Slobber Tooth has come to celebrate savory summer sundaes in Skylands!'
biography: 'Sundae Slobber Tooth is an ice cream counterpart of Slobber Tooth in Skylanders: Lost Islands, introduced in July 2014 as an Alter Ego variant to celebrate the summer season.'
personality: 'Sundae Slobber Tooth is a festive and sweet-toothed version of the original Slobber Tooth, known for his persistence and love for frozen treats.'

story.content: 'Sundae Slobber Tooth is an ice cream counterpart of Slobber Tooth in Skylanders: Lost Islands, introduced in July 2014 as an Alter Ego variant to celebrate the summer season.'

trivia: He is an Alter Ego variant specifically released for the mobile game Skylanders: Lost Islands.
His design is themed after an ice cream sundae, including scoops on his back and a cherry on his head.
gameplay: 'As an Alter Ego in Skylanders: Lost Islands, Sundae Slobber Tooth provides players with a unique visual variant of Slobber Tooth that maintains the base character's mechanics and utility within the game.'
